creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Yes, with nVidia graphics and with Intel graphics, but the problem is that =
I have to disable it in the BIOS, I can not left it enabled/auto in BIOS an=
d use just one of the cards.

What about using this script for disabling OPTIMUS while its enabled ad BIO=
S?
https://twitter.com/xmjEE/status/452401186948513792

Regards,
vermaden
